tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated chloride, which is likely of limited clinical significance in the absence of other electrolyte disturbances. Renal function, glucose control, and lipid profile are satisfactory. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Overall, results are unremarkable and stable for age.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
